title: Shopping Luxury | The Zarna Garg Show | #shorts
full_text: so why is money such a scary topic the reason why people shop expensive Brands is not just because the quality at other places is not good it's because they don't want to waste time the reason why people will just trust certain brands over like actually going through secondhand stores that have the same quality that actually might even have the same exact product but for cheaper is because they're trying to just move on with their day and not spend their entire day looking through different options and they want to make decisions and move quickly a lot of the price the money attached to certain items is pricing in the amount of time you have to think about it before you actually get it
